sentences.arabic: تَنَامُ لَيْلَى ثَمَانِيَ سَاعَاتٍ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Lejla spava osam sati svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: Layla sleeps eight hours every night.

sentences.arabic: تَقُولُ إِنَّ النَّوْمَ الْجَيِّدَ يُعْطِيهَا طَاقَةً لِلْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Kaže da joj dobar san daje energiju za dan.
sentences.translationEn: She says that good sleep gives her energy for the day.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَنْظُرُ إِلَى الْهَاتِفِ قَبْلَ النَّوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ne gleda u telefon prije spavanja.
sentences.translationEn: She does not look at her phone before sleeping.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَيْقِظُ فِي السَّاعَةِ السَّابِعَةِ وَهِيَ نَشِيطَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Budi se u sedam sati i osjeća se svježe.
sentences.translationEn: She wakes up at seven o'clock feeling energetic.
